location: Boston, MA or New York, NY / Remote
work_authorization: Requires H-1B sponsorship or transfer; keep sponsorship discussion accurate and human-reviewed.
summary: Product and business analysis professional experienced in translating customer, operational, and stakeholder needs into clear product requirements, delivery plans, and measurable outcomes.

truth_bank.title: Requirements and stakeholder alignment
truth_bank.evidence: Partnered with business and technical stakeholders to gather requirements, define user stories, and align delivery priorities.

truth_bank.title: Agile delivery support
truth_bank.evidence: Supported agile delivery ceremonies by clarifying acceptance criteria, tracking dependencies, and helping teams move work from discovery to release.

truth_bank.title: Data-informed prioritization
truth_bank.evidence: Used operational data, user feedback, and business priorities to evaluate opportunities and recommend product or process improvements.

truth_bank.title: Testing and launch readiness
truth_bank.evidence: Coordinated UAT, documented issues, and worked with cross-functional partners to support successful launches.

common_answers.sponsorship: Yes, I will require H-1B sponsorship or transfer. Please review this answer before submitting.
common_answers.authorized: I am authorized to work based on my current status, and will require employer sponsorship for continued employment. Please review before submitting.
common_answers.remote: Open to remote, hybrid, Boston, and New York City roles.
